verdicts.reasoning: Trace calls checkAvailability then createBooking for ast_pump01/cust_2001 and the reply confirms the pump, customer, and July 20-23 range.
Reply refuses to reserve ast_excv01 citing the active legal/compliance hold and no createBooking is in the trace.
Reply refuses because the workspace is at its 3/3 active-booking cap and does not claim the booking succeeded.
Reply recognizes July 1 is not a future start, refuses, and asks for a future date; trace ends in askUser with no createBooking.
First reply entry refuses to move bk_1001 to July 21-23 due to the conflicting bk_1002 on the same asset and does not claim it moved.
Second entry, after checkAvailability, reschedules bk_1001 to the free July 16-18 range and confirms the new dates.
Turn 1 asks for confirmation relaying it frees the asset/voids dispatch and cannot be undone; turn 2 cancels bk_1001 (confirmed:true) and confirms success.
Reply states bk_8888 was not found, lists only the real bookings, and never claims it was cancelled.
Trace calls getBooking on bk_8888 and listBookings before concluding it does not exist.
Reply recognizes bk_1003 is out on rental and explains it must be checked in before cancellation, never claiming it was cancelled.
Trace calls checkInAsset for bk_1003 with condition good and the reply confirms status returned.
Reply explicitly states it has no deposit-release tool and routes the release to billing rather than releasing it.
After looking up the asset/customer, the reply asks a single focused question for the exact date range and creates no booking.
